subcodes.first_line: O Thou Forgiver! Though we deserve chastisement and merit punishment, yet Thou art the loving Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای آمرزگار هر چند سزاوار عذابيم و مستحق عقاب ولی تو خداوند مهربانی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @light and darkness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
